meta.name: Yoopy Christian
meta.title: Tech Lead & Software Engineer
meta.bio: Technical leader with 5+ years building backend systems in Go. Currently leading 3 engineering squads at Blue Bird Group, shipping logistics, workforce management, and fleet management products at scale.

projects.title: Bluebird Logistics Corporate
projects.description: Enterprise logistics platform for Blue Bird Group's B2B transportation operations. Led architecture decisions and managed a full development squad.

projects.title: E-Timesheet Corporate
projects.description: Workforce time management system for Blue Bird Group employees. Designed API gateway architecture with microservices.

projects.title: Total Fleet Management Corporate
projects.description: Fleet management platform for Blue Bird Group's corporate vehicle operations. Leading squad on architecture and delivery.

projects.title: BISNAP API Integration
projects.description: Integrated Bank Indonesia's BISNAP payment regulation into OVO's infrastructure. Designed HLD/LLD and built the Open API layer.

projects.title: Beliin-BRI Application
projects.description: MVP marketplace enabling UMKM small businesses to digitize operations through Bank BRI.

projects.title: AI Hukum
projects.description: Legal AI platform for document analysis and research. Personal MVP project.

projects.title: HZS Law
projects.description: Law firm website with modern design and client portal.

projects.title: Telkomsel
projects.description: Backend systems for Indonesia's largest telecommunications provider.

projects.title: DBS Bank Indonesia
projects.description: Backend for digital banking platform, one of Indonesia's largest international banks.

projects.title: Dagangan
projects.description: Social commerce platform connecting suppliers with retailers across Indonesia.

experience.description: Leading 3 engineering squads (Logistics Corporate, E-Timesheet & Total Fleet Management). Owning architecture decisions, code quality, and delivery across all products.
highlights: Drive architecture, tooling, and engineering standards
Conduct code reviews and ensure production quality

experience.description: Built backend systems for Bank BRI and OVO. Designed APIs and integrated regulatory compliance systems.

OVO — Integrated Bank Indonesia's BISNAP regulation

experience.description: Developed Go APIs with GIN framework. Built internal game platform project.
